name: Canada Family Adventure
subtitle: Vancouver → Banff → Toronto

items.title: Arrive Vancouver International Airport (YVR)
items.detail: Canada Line SkyTrain connects airport to downtown in 26 minutes. Day pass C$11.
items.directions: Take Canada Line SkyTrain to Waterfront Station (26 min). Hotel 5-min walk or short cab.

items.title: Check In — Downtown Vancouver Hotel
items.detail: Central location near Stanley Park, Gastown, and Granville Island.
items.directions: Subway: Waterfront Station (Canada Line), walk 5 min to hotel.

items.title: Stanley Park Seawall
items.detail: Bike or walk the 10km seawall around Stanley Park. Rent bikes at the park entrance (C$8/hr).
items.directions: 15-min walk or 5-min cab from downtown core.

notes: Best travel months: Jun–Sep. Book Banff accommodation well in advance — fills up fast in summer.
